query:
SELECT p.id, p.status, p.retryCount, p.mcpPending, p.nextRetryAt, p.theme,
  COUNT(pm.id) AS mediaCount
FROM posts p
LEFT JOIN post_media pm ON pm.postId = p.id
WHERE p.status = 'approved'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.createdAt ASC;

  COUNT(pm.id) AS mediaCount

ORDER BY p.createdAt ASC;
